items.subjective_preview: 15-year-old male presents for sports physical clearance for high school basketball team. No current complaints. Active and healthy. Denies chest pain,...
items.objective_preview: Vitals: BP 110/68 mmHg, HR 66 bpm, Temp 98.6F, Ht 5'10", Wt 155 lbs, BMI 22.2. General: Well-developed, athletic-appearing adolescent. HEENT: Normal. ...
items.assessment: Healthy adolescent - cleared for sports participation without restrictions
items.plan:
1. Cleared for full sports participation including basketball
2. Continue loratadine PRN for allergic rhinitis during outdoor activities
3. Discussed importance of proper warm-up, hydration, and protective equipment
4. Return for any injuries or new symptoms
5. Next annual physical in 12 months
